property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.3.9-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\EGEMEN\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.3.9-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\Intel\Intel(R) Management Engine Components\DAL;C:\Program Files\Intel\Intel(R) Management Engine Components\DAL;C:\Program Files\Intel\WiFi\bin\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Intel\WirelessCommon\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\MATRIKS;C:\MATRIKS\System32\;C:\Users\EGEMEN\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\EGEMEN\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\maven\bin;c:\Users\EGEMEN\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: createComment_withJsonBody_shouldReturn201
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/comments Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "name": "Test Yorumcusu", "postId": 1, "body": "Bu bir otomatik test yorumudur. REST Assured ile oluşturuldu.", "email": "test@example.com" } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Tue, 19 May 2026 14:36:59 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 165 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true access-control-expose-headers: Location Cache-Control: no-cache etag: W/"a5-eUc5GRHEQUo/k5tmpzmwiInZPCc" expires: -1 location: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/comments/501 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=zPn4%2F72zYSSntTxXJYv6LZj5H80KCfznQ%2FTWc4zPxoA%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1779201419"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=zPn4%2F72zYSSntTxXJYv6LZj5H80KCfznQ%2FTWc4zPxoA%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1779201419" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, X-HTTP-Method-Override, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 999 x-ratelimit-reset: 1779201476 cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: 9fe3d647fe69dca0-FRA alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "name": "Test Yorumcusu", "postId": 1, "body": "Bu bir otomatik test yorumudur. REST Assured ile oluşturuldu.", "email": "test@example.com", "id": 501 }

testcase.name: createPost_withMinimalBody_shouldStillReturn201
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "userId": 5 } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Tue, 19 May 2026 14:36:59 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 30 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true access-control-expose-headers: Location Cache-Control: no-cache etag: W/"1e-e07ISbQmd29nUBeG35YhjXlwHyc" expires: -1 location: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/101 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=zPn4%2F72zYSSntTxXJYv6LZj5H80KCfznQ%2FTWc4zPxoA%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1779201419"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=zPn4%2F72zYSSntTxXJYv6LZj5H80KCfznQ%2FTWc4zPxoA%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1779201419" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, X-HTTP-Method-Override, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 998 x-ratelimit-reset: 1779201476 cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: 9fe3d649fd7e382b-FRA alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "userId": 5, "id": 101 }

testcase.name: createPost_shouldReturnGeneratedId
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "title": "Test Başlığı", "body": "Test içeriği buraya gelecek.", "userId": 2 } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Tue, 19 May 2026 14:37:00 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 105 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true access-control-expose-headers: Location Cache-Control: no-cache etag: W/"69-WiOZR89XI+Xkr3gjRR2i+R/HPhM" expires: -1 location: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/101 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=S2mZIF8cMlsnd9suvF3WzN1SZbCd7vDLBZwHd54fFXE%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1779201420"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=S2mZIF8cMlsnd9suvF3WzN1SZbCd7vDLBZwHd54fFXE%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1779201420" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, X-HTTP-Method-Override, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 997 x-ratelimit-reset: 1779201476 cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: 9fe3d64bb8d49b5d-FRA alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "title": "Test Başlığı", "body": "Test içeriği buraya gelecek.", "userId": 2, "id": 101 }

testcase.name: createPost_shouldReturn201AndCreatedResource
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "title": "Otomatik Test ile Oluşturulmuş Post", "body": "Bu post REST Assured kullanılarak JUnit testi ile oluşturulmuştur.", "userId": 1 } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Tue, 19 May 2026 14:37:00 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 165 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true access-control-expose-headers: Location Cache-Control: no-cache etag: W/"a5-d1WTdlxKM05ZbvD2950HGuPfJ7g" expires: -1 location: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/101 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=S2mZIF8cMlsnd9suvF3WzN1SZbCd7vDLBZwHd54fFXE%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1779201420"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=S2mZIF8cMlsnd9suvF3WzN1SZbCd7vDLBZwHd54fFXE%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1779201420" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, X-HTTP-Method-Override, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 996 x-ratelimit-reset: 1779201476 cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: 9fe3d64d6a9fd281-FRA alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "title": "Otomatik Test ile Oluşturulmuş Post", "body": "Bu post REST Assured kullanılarak JUnit testi ile oluşturulmuştur.", "userId": 1, "id": 101 }
